## WritableStore interface

A mutable object that can be subscribed to and whose subscriptions will be notified when the value has changed.

Tip: Stores work best if you only use them for binding a model to your user interface, and nowhere else.

**Signature:**

```typescript
interface WritableStore<T> extends Store<T> 
```
**Extends:** [Store](./openrct2-flexui.store.md)<!-- -->&lt;T&gt;

<tbody><tr><td>

[set(value)](./openrct2-flexui.writablestore.set.md)


</td><td>

Updates the current value to a new one. If the new value is different from the old one, it will notifies all subscribers of this change.


</td></tr>
